prompt: After 3 years of running user interviews, I've learned that the most valuable insights come not from what users say they want, but from the workarounds they've built. When a user shows me a spreadsheet hack or a manual process, that's where the real opportunity is. Capture this as a TK unit.
expected_output: Structured TK unit capturing the interview insight pattern
expectations: Output creates a structured TK unit with clear naming
Output captures the core insight about workarounds vs stated needs
Output defines when to apply this knowledge (trigger/context)
Output includes a decision framework or heuristic
Output shows how to embed this knowledge in an agent instruction
